data.content: ReTakes view was showing nothing because: (1) the dev server .next cache contained stale compilation artifacts with merge conflict markers from an intermediate merge state, causing a 500 error on the entire /beads page; (2) the unpushed commit c924e1d (remove scenes screen) hadn't been pushed to origin. Fix: cleared .next cache, restarted dev server, pushed pending commits. Verified via Playwright that the retakes view correctly displays 49 shipped beats. All quality gates pass (build, typecheck, 1858 tests).
